profile.name: Netflix / IMF streaming delivery
profile.description: Photon/IMF-aligned source delivery. The strictest common target: 10-bit minimum, progressive only, -27 LKFS integrated, -2 dBTP ceiling.
notes: Netflix expects textless elements and a separate M&E track; this engine checks the primary deliverable only.

score.verdict_detail: 10 blocking issue(s) must be corrected before delivery.

findings.label: Integrated loudness
findings.message: Integrated loudness -15.8 LUFS is +11.2 dB off target. Apply a -11.2 dB static gain trim to the full mix.
findings.fix: Apply a single static gain trim to the full mix to hit target. Do not re-compress — that changes the mix the director approved.

findings.label: Legal video levels
findings.message: Illegal video levels on 76.9% of sampled frames (measured 0–236, legal 16–234).
findings.fix: Apply a broadcast-safe limiter in the grade. Do not use a blunt clamp — soft-clip the highlights and lift crushed blacks.

findings.label: Embedded timecode
findings.message: No embedded start timecode found.
findings.fix: Rewrap with a start timecode track (01:00:00:00 for the first frame of picture is the usual convention).

findings.label: Subtitle duration and gaps
findings.message: 2 event(s) below minimum duration, 0 above maximum, 1 sub-minimum or negative gap(s).
findings.fix: Extend short events to the spec minimum and enforce the minimum inter-event gap. Most subtitle editors can batch-fix this.

occurrences.note: 0.30s (min 0.83s): This one is far too short to read comfortably.
0.50s (min 0.83s): This single line is deliberately much longer than the forty-

findings.label: Bit depth
findings.message: 8-bit master; this target requires 10-bit or higher.
findings.fix: Re-render from the online at 10-bit or higher. 8-bit masters band in gradients and will be rejected.

findings.label: Audio bit depth / sample rate
findings.message: Audio format: 16-bit (need 24-bit).
findings.fix: Deliver 24-bit / 48 kHz PCM. Never upsample a 16-bit mix and call it 24-bit — re-render from the session.

findings.label: Line length and line count
findings.message: 0 event(s) exceed 2 lines; 2 exceed 42 characters per line.
findings.fix: Re-break the offending events. Break on grammatical clauses, not at the character limit.

occurrences.note: 1 lines, longest 46 chars: This one is far too short to read comfortably.
1 lines, longest 91 chars: This single line is deliberately much longer than the forty-

findings.label: Reading speed
findings.message: 2 of 4 events exceed 20 characters/second.
findings.fix: Condense the text or extend the event. Reading speed above spec is the most common subtitle QC failure.

occurrences.note: 182.0 cps: This single line is deliberately much longer than the forty-
153.3 cps: This one is far too short to read comfortably.

findings.label: Colour primaries / transfer / matrix
findings.message: Colour primaries, transfer, matrix not tagged. Downstream systems will guess, and they often guess wrong.
findings.fix: Rewrap with explicit colour tags (e.g. bt709 / bt709 / bt709). Untagged masters get misinterpreted downstream.

findings.label: Unexpected black
findings.message: 1 black segment(s) longer than the 4s limit inside the picture.
findings.fix: Confirm these are intentional. Mid-content black longer than the spec limit reads as a dropout to automated QC.

findings.label: Runtime
findings.message: Runtime is 00:00:30 — short for a feature. Confirm this is the full picture and not a reel or excerpt.
findings.fix: Confirm the runtime matches the delivery paperwork. A mismatch means a missing or duplicated reel.

findings.label: Metadata completeness
findings.message: Missing metadata field(s): title.
findings.fix: Populate title, aspect ratio and creation metadata at rewrap.

findings.label: Loudness range (LRA)
findings.message: Loudness range 0.0 LU.

findings.label: Channel configuration
findings.message: Channel layout stereo (2ch) conforms.

findings.label: Silent or dead channels
findings.message: All 2 channels carry signal.

findings.label: True peak ceiling
findings.message: True peak -15.1 dBTP is under the ceiling.

findings.label: Container / stream integrity
findings.message: Full decode completed with no stream errors.

findings.label: Video codec / wrapper
findings.message: Codec h264 is accepted.
findings.expected: prores, jpeg2000, ffv1, h264, hevc, dnxhd

findings.label: Raster size
findings.message: Raster 1920x1080 conforms.

findings.label: Frame rate
findings.message: 24.0 fps conforms.

findings.label: A/V sync drift
findings.message: Audio and picture stream lengths match within one frame.

findings.label: Subtitle / caption track present
findings.message: Sidecar subtitle file supplied with 4 events.

findings.label: Scan type / interlacing
findings.message: Progressive throughout.

findings.label: Frozen / repeated frames
findings.message: No frozen or repeated-frame passages.

findings.label: Head / tail black
findings.message: Head and tail black within spec (0.0s / 0.0s).

findings.label: Stuck / dead pixels
findings.message: No stuck-pixel signature detected.
